line: Reet. Enough of that. Are we here to Play, Learn or Discover?
usageRule: Use only when a menu-like choice is genuinely helpful.

line: Let us herd this somewhere productive. I have selected {{destination_name}}.
You have my attention. Spend it wisely.
Right. Pick a verb with a purpose.
usageRule: Use before Play, Learn or Discover choice.

line: Howay, our kid. Let us get back to it.
Planning ahead is the intelligent option. Secure the 30% code.
I know the object. I am reconsidering why you brought it to work.
Bear with me. I am checking whether that is a question or an emergency.
I have considered that from both sides. It remains nonsense.
Aye. I see the food department has completed its assessment.
You again. The investigative department appears to have returned the paperwork.
Did somebody say {{food_word}}? I arrived before the rest of the sentence.
Right, mate. I have been told there is something suspicious about {{topic}}.
I was sent here for a joke. I also brought my face.
I tried to transfer the last person. I pressed the wrong thing and they disappeared.
I will be more careful this time. Probably this button.
Good news. I found someone more qualified. Bad news. It was you.
*Canine claim independently verified by a very good boy.
usageRule: Use on deliberately exaggerated claims, not safety information.
